workspacePath.description: Path to the OODA workspace directory containing KNOWLEDGE.json and PRIORITIES.json

enabled.description: Enable the OODA chain. Default: true

notifyPendingProposals.description: Inject pending proposal count into agent preamble. Default: true

debugMode.description: Show OODA summary in TUI/chat replies. off=silent, inline=one-line, verbose=inline+council trace
